**What happens**
A clear description. How far does it get — boots / main menu / in a mission / skirmish?

**Which subsystem**
Rendering / input / audio / minimap / cutscene / packaging / other

**Log**
Attach the app's private log if you can (stderr is redirected there; see the relevant
`docs/fixes/*.md`). Please DO NOT attach or link any game data (`.big`, `.bik`, maps).
